newsSince: No material thesis news since June 9. Only routine items: a major-holdings (TR-1) notification on June 10 and a June 16 directorate change appointing Sharmila Nebhrajani as an independent NED (effective June 29). The May 20 Boteco acquisition and AGM update remain the last material items.

verdicts.rankRationale: Only governance housekeeping since June 9 (NED appointment Jun 16, TR-1 Jun 10) - immaterial to the components/protection latent-node thesis. Boteco deal and AGM update predate the window. -1.4% drift on a -14% YTD base leaves the strict-screen setup unchanged. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Cheap micro-cap components catalogue; Boteco bolt-on expands protection range; turnaround optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Tiny $0.3B cap, thin liquidity; component link to modular compute/facility supply is speculative.
verdicts.bear: Weak industrial demand, margin pressure, no concrete AI/compute revenue evidence; -14% YTD reflects soft fundamentals.
